labRequirements.specialPopulationNotes: Includes patients with eGFR <30 ml/min per 1.73 m2 or treated with dialysis. GLP-1 RA should not be used in combination with a DPP-4 inhibitor. Consider stopping DPP-4 inhibitor to facilitate GLP-1 RA treatment.
labRequirements.sourceSnippet: Additional drug therapy as needed for glycemic control: GLP-1 receptor agonist (preferred), DPP-4 inhibitor, Insulin, Sulfonylurea, TZD, Alpha-glucosidase inhibitor. Guided by patient preferences, comorbidities, eGFR, and cost.
